recommendations.title: The Lion Guard: Return of the Roar
recommendations.overview: Set in the African savannah, the film follows Kion as he assembles the members of the 'Lion Guard'. Throughout the film, the diverse team of young animals will learn how to utilize each of their unique abilities to solve problems and accomplish tasks

recommendations.title: The Machine Girl
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Crime, Horror, Thriller
recommendations.overview: The life of a young, Japanese schoolgirl is destroyed when her family is killed by a Ninja-Yakuza family. Her hand cut off, she replaces it with various machines-of-death, and seeks revenge.

recommendations.title: They're Watching
recommendations.overview: An American TV crew gets trapped in a centuries-old web of revenge, horror, and blood, when their home improvement show is attacked by angry Eastern European villagers out to kill the show's star.

recommendations.title: Don't Move
recommendations.overview: A grieving woman in a secluded forest encounters a killer who injects her with a paralytic drug. As her body shuts down, her fight for survival begins.

recommendations.title: Hush
recommendations.overview: A deaf woman is stalked by a psychotic killer in her secluded home.

recommendations.title: Alice in Terrorland
recommendations.overview: A recently bereaved teenage girl goes to live with her aunt in a secluded woodland house, unaware that sinister forces lurk within.

recommendations.title: Hatari!
recommendations.overview: A female wildlife photographer arrives on an East African reservation where a group of men trap wild animals for zoos and circuses.

recommendations.title: Kill Theory
recommendations.overview: While celebrating a graduation at a secluded vacation home, a group of college students find themselves targeted by a sadistic killer who forces them to play a deadly game of killing one another in order to survive.

recommendations.title: Dark Light
recommendations.overview: A woman returns to her family home and discovers it to be inhabited by monsters.

recommendations.title: SPL 2: A Time for Consequences
recommendations.overview: While undercover officer Kit is taken prisoner by the syndicate, he befriends his keeper and discovers an organ trafficking ring.
